pages.title: Config Location
pages.text: Config file:$(br2)$oworld/serverconfig/botzmobleveling-server.toml$() (per-world)$(br2)Or:$(br2)$oconfig/botzmobleveling-common.toml$() (common)$(br2)Changes require restart to fully take effect.

pages.title: General Section
pages.text: $(bold)enabled$() (bool, default: true) - Master switch$(br2)$(bold)showLevelInName$() (bool, default: true) - Nameplate display$(br2)$(bold)debugMode$() (bool, default: false) - Verbose logging

pages.title: Rule Toggles
pages.text: $(bold)structureLevelingEnabled$() (bool, default: true)$(br2)$(bold)biomeLevelingEnabled$() (bool, default: true)$(br2)$(bold)distanceLevelingEnabled$() (bool, default: true)$(br2)Disable entire rule types globally without removing datapacks.

pages.title: Filtering Section
pages.text: $(bold)applyToPassiveMobs$() (bool, default: false)$(br2)$(bold)applyToBossMobs$() (bool, default: false)$(br2)$(bold)structureOverridesPassiveFilter$() (bool, default: true)$(br2)$(bold)structureOverridesBossFilter$() (bool, default: true)$(br2)$(bold)leveledPassivesCanAttack$() (bool, default: true)$(br2)$(bold)mobBlacklist$() (string list)

pages.title: Level Settings
pages.text: $(bold)defaultMinLevel$() (int, default: 1)$(br2)$(bold)defaultMaxLevel$() (int, default: 100)$(br2)$(bold)globalLevelCap$() (int, default: 100)$(br2)Defaults apply when no rule matches. Global cap applies everywhere unless ignored.

pages.title: Distance Settings
pages.text: $(bold)distanceStartRadius$() (int, default: 100)$(br2)$(bold)distancePerLevel$() (int, default: 50)$(br2)$(bold)distanceLevelMultiplier$() (double, default: 1.0)$(br2)Formula: level = min + ((distance - start) / perLevel) x multiplier
